calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098.

Robert Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary E. Looney, Khai Banh & Blake Sgamda, the President, Sales Representative and Division Manager for plaintiff, respectively, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant U Street Lounge, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 29, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant John Kelly, a/k/a John M. Kelly, a/k/a John Kelley was filed on December 6, 2007.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 11, 2009.
Declaration of Gary E. Looney re: Costs and Computation of Interest in Support of Entry of Judgment was filed today, May 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against defendant U Street Lounge, LLC, a California Limited Liablity Company as follows:

Principal - $3,709.14.
Interest - $2,039.84.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $677.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $6,426.48.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
